title: Medical device licensing - Canada.ca
content:
## Medical device licensing
Access forms and guidance documents to help you apply for a medical device licence. Also search for a licensed device using the listing database.

## Services and information

### Medical device active licence listing
Search for medical devices that have an active licence.

### Guidance documents for medical device licensing
Guidance documents to help with applying for a medical device licence.

### Medical device licensing forms
Apply for a medical device licence.
